final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [7:0] addr,
    output reg [31:0] data,
	 input write,
	 input [7:0] addr_wr,
	 input [31:0] data_in
    );reg [31:0] program_array [0:255];

	 always @(posedge clk)
    begin
        if (write) begin
            program_array[addr_wr] <= data_in;
        end
    end	

	 always @(posedge clk)
    begin
        data <= program_array[addr];
    end	

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      data <= ~program_array[addr];
      program_array[addr_wr] <= ~data_in;
    end
  end

endmodule
